channel.title: Posts on My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on My New Hugo Site

item.title: My First Post
item.description:
This is my first blog, i am a information science student in Bangalore,so this is my second semester. I have chosen this course because i like computing, i also participated in a science exhibition in my school time, i had created a robotic arm, also try to build a drone, but i failed very badely.

How a computer works inside the hardware, and how it understands our commands, after giving instruction how it processes it. It is truly passive to work with a computer.
